name: SFA Visit & Value Report
query:
SELECT 
    v.owner AS "Salesperson:Link/User:150",
    v.customer AS "Customer:Link/Customer:150",
    v.custom_latitude AS "Lat:Data:100",
    v.custom_longitude AS "Lng:Data:100",
    v.start_time AS "Check-In:Datetime:150",
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, v.start_time, v.end_time) AS "Duration (Mins):Int:100",
    v.outcome AS "Outcome:Data:100",
    IFNULL(SUM(s.grand_total), 0) AS "Order Value:Currency:120"
FROM `tabVisit Log` v
LEFT JOIN `tabSales Order` s ON v.customer = s.customer AND DATE(v.start_time) = s.transaction_date AND s.docstatus = 1
GROUP BY v.name
ORDER BY v.start_time DESC
